items.message: Removed the Section 1–3 divisions as structural fields, retained the consecutive global numbering 1–9, and added the section ranges to the instructions.

items.original_text: Answer six questions, at least one in each section.

items.message: Restarted numbering within the three source sections was replaced by one consecutive sequence: Set Theory became problems 1–3, Computability became problems 4–6, and Model theory became problems 7–9.
The selection rule referring to “each section” was rewritten using the final problem ranges, and the source topic names were mapped to those ranges.

purpose: Completed structural transformations such as renumbering and instruction consolidation.
